experiment_title: 红墨水在水和乙醇中的混溶性实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="红墨水在水和乙醇中的混溶性实验" goal="观察红墨水在水和乙醇中的混溶性及分层现象" difficulty="Easy" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="10mL" />
      <Component id="test_tube_2" type="test_tube" capacity="10mL" />
      <Component id="graduated_cylinder_1" type="graduated_cylinder" capacity="10mL" />
      <Component id="dropper_1" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="dropper_2" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="test_tube_holder_1" type="test_tube_holder" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Distilled_Water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Red_Ink" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Ethanol" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="graduated_cylinder_1" reagent="H2O" volume="2 mL" id="step_0" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="graduated_cylinder_1" to_vessel="test_tube_1" volume="2 mL" id="step_1" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="Red_Dye" volume="0.1 mL" tool="dropper_1" id="step_2" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_1" support="test_tube_holder_1" id="step_3" />
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_4" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_5" />
      <Insert tool="dropper_2" vessel="test_tube_2" id="step_6" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="test_tube_2" to_vessel="test_tube_1" volume="2 mL" tool="dropper_2" id="step_7" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_8" />
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_9" />
      <Wait time="180s" id="step_10" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 量取蒸馏水并转移至试管，为实验做准备。
向试管中加入红墨水，固定试管并充分混合，观察红墨水在水中的溶解情况。
准备第二支试管，吸取乙醇加入含红墨水的试管，混合并观察分层或混溶现象。
